bird.name: 罗纹鸭
bird.summary: 罗纹鸭（學名：Mareca falcata），又名葭凫、罗文鸭、镰刀毛小鸭、镰刀鸭、扁头鸭、早鸭、三鸭。 特征 罗纹鸭系中等体形的Mareca属鸟类，体长约为50厘米左右。本物种雄雌异形异色，雄鸟头部为带金属光泽的紫红色，额部近嘴基处有一很小的白色色块；后颈及颈侧的羽毛略长，垂…

relations.subject: 罗纹鸭
relations.evidence: A primary threat to the falcated duck is hunting, as people want them for food and their feathers
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: 罗纹鸭
relations.evidence: Their habitat loss is also caused by the drainage of the wetlands. Although the overall population of the falcated duck is larger than once believed and is no longer classified as an endangered species, it is still considered "near threatened" on the IUCN's (or the International Union for the Conservation of Nature's) Animal Red List.{{cite web |last1=Butchart |first1=S
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.object_summary: 湿地被排干转为农业或建设用地。
